title: Computer Specs
excerpt: I have been having some pretty decent load times for my automations and duplications. Does anybody that does a lot of high volume boards like myself experience this? If you do not, what kind of computer specs are you run…

posts.author: Avery (Avery Romine)
posts.cookedHtml: I have been having some pretty decent load times for my automations and duplications. Does anybody that does a lot of high volume boards like myself experience this? If you do not, what kind of computer specs are you running or recommend?
